auth.signInSubtitle: Denial recovery from your own NPHIES data.
auth.devNote: Dev sign-in. Managed KSA-resident OIDC is a deploy-time swap.

common.errorBody: We hit a problem loading this page. Your data is safe — try again.
common.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

trust.notDevice: Not an SFDA medical device. Decision support with human review.
trust.humanInLoop: Draft, not sent. A person reviews every appeal. Taweed never submits on its own.

money.atRiskLong: Denied, not yet recovered. Last {n} months.

overview.title: Overview
overview.welcome: Your recovery loop at a glance.
overview.runScrubber: Run the scrubber on your next batch
overview.buildReport: Build the owner report. One page. What you recovered this month.

analytics.title: Denial Analytics
analytics.heroLead: Denial rate {rate}. SAR {amount} at risk, last {n} months.
analytics.benchmark: Industry first-pass benchmark ~15%. The gap is the payload.
analytics.trendChartSummary: Line chart of denied and recovered claims by month, from {start} to {end}. Denied: SAR {deniedStart} in {start}, SAR {deniedEnd} in {end}. Recovered: SAR {recoveredStart} in {start}, SAR {recoveredEnd} in {end}.
analytics.paretoNote: A few reasons drive most of the loss.
analytics.paretoChartSummary: Bar and cumulative-percentage chart of denial reasons by SAR value, showing a few reasons drive most of the loss. Top reasons: {list}.
analytics.emptyBody: Ingest 3 to 6 months of remittances to see your denial map.

ingest.title: Ingest
ingest.dropzone: Drag 3 to 6 months of remittances. NPHIES ClaimResponse export, XLSX, or EOB PDF.
ingest.quarantineLead: {n} rows could not be read and were set aside. The rest imported.
ingest.emptyBody: Drop your NPHIES ClaimResponse files, remittance CSV, or EOB PDFs. We do your first import with you.
ingest.resultLead: {claims} claims, {denials} denials detected, SAR {atRisk} at risk.
ingest.pdfResultLead: Submitted for review. Open the Review queue tab above to check and approve it.
ingest.pdfForbidden: You do not have permission to upload remittances.
ingest.pdfInvalid: That file could not be read as a PDF. Check the file and try again.
ingest.pdfRateLimited: Too many extractions submitted recently. Wait a moment and try again.
ingest.pdfDisabled: AI extraction is currently off for this tenant. Enter this remittance manually or ask an admin to enable it.
ingest.pdfMisconfigured: AI extraction is enabled but not configured yet. Enter this remittance manually for now.
ingest.pdfFailed: That PDF could not be processed. Try again, or enter this remittance manually.

csvMapping.title: Map your columns
csvMapping.lead: We matched your columns to the fields below. Review and correct any before importing — nothing is saved until you confirm.
csvMapping.notAuthorized: You do not have permission to upload remittances.
csvMapping.rateLimited: Too many uploads submitted recently. Wait a moment and try again.
csvMapping.emptyFile: That file has no columns to map.
csvMapping.fileTooLarge: That file is too large to import. Split it into smaller files and try again.
csvMapping.xlsxNotWired: XLSX import is not enabled yet. Export the file as CSV or TSV and try again.
csvMapping.previewFailed: That file could not be read. Check the file and try again.

reviewQueue.emptyBody: No AI-extracted remittances are waiting on a human review right now.
reviewQueue.escalatedNote: The model flagged this extraction for extra scrutiny before you approve it.
reviewQueue.reviewInconsistent: Your edits don't add up — check the highlighted totals before approving.
reviewQueue.reviewForbidden: You do not have permission to review remittance extractions.
reviewQueue.reviewInvalid: That request was not valid. Refresh and try again.
reviewQueue.reviewNotPending: This extraction was already decided by someone else.
reviewQueue.reviewNotSeeded: This tenant has no branch, provider, patient, or payer set up yet.
reviewQueue.reviewFailed: That action did not complete. Refresh and try again.
reviewQueue.pagePreviewPending: Page preview pending TODO(ai-route) — no page image is rendered this pass.

scrubber.title: Pre-submission Scrubber
scrubber.lead: Flag claims likely to deny before submission. Every flag traces to a named rule.
scrubber.protects: Fixing these {n} flags protects SAR {amount} you would otherwise resubmit.
scrubber.emptyBody: Run the scrubber on your latest batch to surface deny risk.

appeals.title: Appeal Generator
appeals.lead: Draft a reconsideration letter matched to the denial reason and payer. You review, you send.
appeals.readyNudge: {n} denials are appeal-ready. Drafts written. You review, you send.
appeals.emptyBody: Denials become appealable once ingested and categorized.
appeals.aiSuppressed: The assistant’s draft did not pass the safety checks. Use the letter above.
appeals.aiUnavailable: AI suggestions are unavailable. Use the letter above.
appeals.aiDisclaimer: Review each paragraph before inserting. Facts (amounts, dates, codes) are inserted deterministically — the assistant writes only the argument.

recovery.title: Recovery Tracking
recovery.lead: Every recovered SAR moves from at-risk to recovered.
recovery.wonToast: Won. SAR {amount} recovered from {payer}. Moved from at-risk to recovered.
recovery.emptyBody: Generate an appeal to start the recovery loop.

settings.title: Settings
settings.digitNote: Money, counts, and codes render Western digits in both languages. Arabic-Indic digits apply to narrative prose only.
settings.author: Author
settings.authorLead: Describe a billing rule in plain English or Arabic. The assistant drafts a structured scrubber rule; it runs only after you approve it.
settings.authorPlaceholder: e.g. Flag any claim over SAR 1000 submitted without prior authorization.
settings.gatePassed: Passed every gate — safe to approve
settings.authorOff: AI rule authoring is off. You can still add rules manually.
settings.authorMisconfigured: AI authoring is enabled but not configured. Contact an administrator.
settings.authorGenError: The assistant could not produce a valid rule. Try rephrasing.
settings.authorRateLimited: Too many authoring requests. Wait a moment and try again.
settings.authorForbidden: You do not have permission to author rules.
settings.authorInvalid: That request was not valid. Check the rule text and scope.
settings.actionFailed: That action did not complete. Refresh and try again.

landing.eyebrow: NPHIES-native denial recovery for mid-market clinic groups
landing.heroSub: See exactly which payers and codes are draining your revenue, and recover it, from your own NPHIES data. No new system.
landing.illustrative: Illustrative figure. Get your real number from a free audit.
landing.ctaNote: We quantify the leak in one report. No commitment.
landing.beat1Body: Denial analytics on your own claims. Denial rate by payer, branch, code, and reason, with the money at risk named.
landing.beat2Body: A pre-submission scrubber flags claims likely to deny before you send them. Every flag traces to a named rule.
landing.beat3Body: Bilingual appeals drafted for you. You review, you send. Recovered SAR tracked to the riyal.
landing.desireTitle: You pay for what we recover.
landing.desireBody: A per-branch base plus 10 to 15% of what we actually recover. If you do not recover, that share is zero.
landing.trustEncryption: Encrypted at rest. Every access logged.
landing.trustHuman: Not an SFDA medical device. A person reviews every appeal.
landing.actionTitle: Get your leak number this week.
landing.actionBody: A free denial audit on your own data. We quantify the leak in one report and leave it with you.
landing.footer: Taweed. NPHIES denial recovery for KSA clinic groups.

onboarding.step1Lead: Arabic or English. Light or dark. No account setup.
onboarding.step2Lead: One branch is enough to start.
onboarding.step3Lead: Drag 3 to 6 months of remittances. NPHIES ClaimResponse export, XLSX, or EOB PDF.
onboarding.doThisWithMeLead: Book a white-glove import. We do the first one with you.
onboarding.handoffSaveError: We could not save this step. Your data is safe, try again.

report.trustDevice: Not an SFDA medical device. Decision support with human review.
